description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: At the Monthly Settlement Cycle, all SKY-staking wallets are tagged as High Activity or Standard Activity, pursuant to the criteria defined in [A.2.
.1.2.5.2.3 - Standard Activity Staker Qualification](a22d900a-d15c-41f0-af90-eec23112dcb6). Only High Activity wallets share HASR; both High and Standard Activity wallets share SASR.

At the Monthly Settlement Cycle, all SKY-staking wallets are tagged as High Activity or Standard Activity, pursuant to the criteria defined in [A.2.3.1.2.3.4 - High Activity Staker Qualification](8e83f80f-5606-41a7-bc90-d79df38b55fe) and [A.2.3.1.2.5.2.3 - Standard Activity Staker Qualification](a22d900a-d15c-41f0-af90-eec23112dcb6). Only High Activity wallets share HASR; both High and Standard Activity wallets share SASR.
